content:
Overview

Compliance should be deterministic, testable, and reviewable. This write-up shows how to encode NIST 800-53 control intent into Terraform module patterns with governance-grade outputs and drift-aware reconciliation.

Reference Architecture

State safety and locking

Use remote state backends and state locking to ensure a single source of truth during CI/CD runs.

Governance outputs

Expose policy-relevant fields (network posture, IAM boundaries, logging surfaces) so audits can validate configuration without manual interpretation.

Drift detection loop

Run plan/apply cycles so unauthorized deltas are identified and reconciled back to a hardened baseline.

Verification

Verification is twofold: infrastructure convergence (no diff) and compliance continuity (control-aligned changes validated through module outputs and change logs).
